name: Tiramisu Toffee Torte
recipeIngredient: 4 toffee candy bars (1/4 oz each), very finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease and flour two 9 or 8 inch round cake pans. In a large bowl, combine the cake mix, 1 cup of coffee, and egg whites at low speed until moistened. Beat for 2 minutes at high speed. Fold in chopped toffee bars. Spread batter evenly in greased and floured pans. Bake at 350°F for 9-inch pans (20-30 minutes) or 8-inch pans (30-40 minutes), or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean. Cool pans for 10 minutes, then remove from pans and cool completely.
In a medium bowl, combine the first three frosting ingredients. Beat until smooth. Add whipping cream and vanilla; beat until light and fluffy. Refrigerate until ready to use.
To assemble:
Slice each cake layer in half horizontally to make four layers. Drizzle each cut side with 1/4 cup of coffee. Place one layer, coffee side up, on a serving plate and spread with 3/4 cup frosting. Repeat with the second and third cake layers. Top with the remaining cake layer. Frost the sides and top of the cake with the remaining frosting. Garnish with chopped toffee bars. Store in the refrigerator.
